data.title: Bitcoin ETFs See $9 Billion Inflows Amid Escalating Shift Away From Gold
data.description:
Recent trends in the Bitcoin ETFs market reveal a significant shift in investor sentiment, with funds flowing into BTC exchange-traded funds while gold-backed funds experience notable outflows. Bitcoin ETFs Emerge As Preferred Safe Haven According to a Bloomberg report, US Bitcoin ETFs have attracted over $9 billion in inflows in the past five weeks, primarily driven by BlackRock Inc. ’s iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT). In contrast, gold-backed funds have seen outflows exceeding $2
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-etfs-see-9-billion-inflows-amid-escalating-shift-away-from-gold/

data.title: Stripe’s Secret Talks with Banks Signal a Massive Stablecoin Shift
data.description:
TL;DR Stripe, one of the world’s largest payment companies, has started discussions with banks to integrate stablecoins into their services. Currently, over $240 billion worth of stablecoins are in circulation. Stripe aims to promote their everyday use, competing with similar initiatives from PayPal and Visa, and has already launched products to accelerate crypto adoption in. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/stripes-secret-talks-with-banks-signal-a-massive-stablecoin-shift/

data.title: New Wallet Withdraws Significant Ethereum Amount from CEX
data.description: According to TechFlow, a newly created wallet recently withdrew 4,150 ETH, valued at approximately $10.72 million, from a centralized exchange (CEX). This transaction was detected by the on-chain analysis platform Lookonchain about 50 minutes prior to the report.

data.title: Matador Signs Letter of Intent to Invest $3.2 Million in Technology Company HODL Systems
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Canadian technology company Matador Technologies Inc. has signed a binding letter of intent to invest up to $3.2 million in Indian technology company HODL Systems. It is reported that HODL Systems has announced the implementation of a financial strategy including investment in digital assets. After the completion of this investment transaction, Matador will hold a 24.95% stake in the company and will also expand into the Indian market, including the distribution of its proprietary digital gold products and other Ordinals technologies. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Brazilian Firm Meliuz Seeks to Raise $26.45 Million for Bitcoin Purchase
data.description: According to PANews, Brazilian publicly traded company Meliuz has filed an application to raise $26.45 million. The funds are intended for the acquisition of Bitcoin, as reported by Bitcoin Magazine.

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 4150 ETH from Kraken
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, about 50 minutes ago, a newly created wallet withdrew 4,150 ETH from Kraken, worth 10.72 million US dollars.

data.title: Centralized AI threatens a democratic digital future
data.description:

data.title: Stablecoin Payments Projected to Reach $850 Billion by 2030
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from OKG Research reveals that stablecoin payments have reached an annual settlement volume of $50.8 billion as of 2024. This figure represents 7.3% of the global personal cross-border remittance market, which is approximately $696 billion. The report highlights that stablecoin payments have maintained an annual growth rate exceeding 60% for two consecutive years. The advantages of low fees, real-time settlement, and round-the-clock availability are gradually positioning blockchain-based payments as a viable alternative to traditional cross-border remittance channels. OKG Research anticipates that if the current growth rate persists, the scale of stablecoin cross-border settlements could surpass $850 billion by 2030.

data.title: Binance Lawsuit Dropped: SEC Quietly Ends Longstanding Legal Battle
data.description:
TL;DR The SEC and Binance have closed their legal dispute that began in 2023, after accusations of operating without proper registration and manipulating information about their internal controls. The agency dropped the lawsuit against Binance as part of a shift in its regulatory strategy, now prioritizing fair oversight over punitive actions. The SEC created a. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/binance-lawsuit-dropped-sec-quietly-ends-longstanding-legal-battle/

data.title: Atlanta Fed significantly raised the US Q2 economic growth rate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Atlanta Fed GDPNow model predicts that the US GDP growth rate in the second quarter will be 3.8%, which was previously expected to be 2.2%. After the recent release of data from the US Census Bureau and the US Bureau of Economic Analysis, the Atlanta Fed GDPNow model predicts that the immediate forecast of net exports' contribution to real GDP growth in the second quarter will jump from -0.64% to 1.45%. However, the immediate forecast of real personal consumption expenditure growth in the second quarter and real domestic private gross investment growth in the second quarter declined from 3.7% and -0.2% to 3.3% and -1.4%, respectively. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin at Risk of Breakdown if Major Support Level Fails, Says Trader Justin Bennett – Here Are His Targets
data.description:
Cryptocurrency analyst and trader Justin Bennett is warning that Bitcoin (BTC) faces the risk of correcting by double-digit percentage points if a key support level crumbles. In a new strategy session, Bennett tells 63,300 subscribers of the Daily Price Action YouTube channel that Bitcoin is showing signs of a potential bearish reversal.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/30/bitcoin-at-risk-of-breakdown-if-major-support-level-fails-says-trader-justin-bennett-here-are-his-targets/

data.title: Why Is Crypto Crashing? Everything to Know About New Congress Market Bill
data.description:

A new bill—called the CLARITY Act—has landed in Congress, proposing to wrest oversight of digital assets away from the SEC and hand it to the CFTC. If passed, the.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/why-is-crypto-crashing-everything-to-know-about-new-bill/
